title: Petrovietnam, Brazil's FS Seek Cooperation in Biofuel Production
content: Le Xuan Huyen, deputy CEO of Petrovietnam, together with representatives from the state-owned group's member units, last week met with representatives of Brazilâ€™s leading ethanol producer FS in Hanoi to discuss cooperation in biofuel production.FS vice president Daniel Lopes expressed a strong interest in forming a strategic partnership with Petrovietnam in production and distribution of biofuels, especially E10 gasoline, aligning with Vietnamâ€™s clean energy and carbon neutrality goals.n addition to biofuels, FS also produces biomass-based electricity from corn by-products and supplies DDG.
author: Analysts Account
